action.description:
Introduced by Senators L. Johnson, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer and Wall; 
cosponsored by Representatives Sinicki, Hysell, Madison, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Johnson, Kirsch, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Prado, Roe, Sheehan, Snodgrass, Stroud, Stubbs and Taylor
